description: Welcome the Chinese New Year with a vibrant, animated email template. Perfect for Chinese restaurant owners in New York or elsewhere, this creative design will surely entice customers with its colorful, photographic elements. Celebrate the Year of the Rat with joyful, light-hearted imagery and a strong, robust typography in Roboto and Slab. This template also includes a discount coupon, making it ideal for seasonal promotions and special events. It's easy to download and customize to fit your restaurant's unique style. The dominant red, white, and yellow colors not only match the festive season but also symbolize luck and prosperity in Chinese culture. Whether you're in the food and beverage industry or travel & leisure sector, this template can add a spark to your New Year email campaigns.
short_description: Celebrate the Chinese New Year with this vibrant, animated email template. Perfect for New York Chinese restaurant owners, it features a discount coupon, festive colors, and robust typography. Ideal for food, beverage, and travel sectors. Download and customize to enhance your New Year campaigns.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.

About the restaurant

DISCOVER OUR MENU 🥡
 
 

About the "Year of the Rat"

 

The Rat is the first of all zodiac animals. According to one myth, the Jade Emperor said the order would be decided by the order in which they arrived to his party. The Rat tricked the Ox into giving him a ride.
Then, just as they arrived at the finish line, Rat jumped down and landed ahead of Ox, becoming first.

Learn more about it
